name_en: M14134 Pocket Card Holder, Gradient Black! This pocket card holder is made from Monogram Macassar coated canvas, featuring leather trim and a neat lining that matches the bright tones. The compact design includes pockets, card slots, and an outer pocket for credit cards and transit cards.
name_cn:
M14134 Pocket Card Holder, Gradient Black! This pocket card holder is made from Monogram Macassar coated canvas, featuring leather trim and a neat lining that matches the bright tones. The compact design includes pockets, card slots, and an outer pocket for credit cards and transit cards.
Size: 7.5 x 11.1 x 1 cm.
